features: MOISTURISING TREATMENT: Specially formulated lotion that helps manage dry and itchy skin conditions,
DUAL PURPOSE: Functions both as a moisturising lotion and as a soap substitute, offering versatile skincare benefits
GENEROUS SIZE: 500ml bottle provides an ample supply for regular daily use and skincare maintenance
SKIN COMFORT: Helps soothe and relieve dry, itchy skin while maintaining proper moisture levels for healthier-looking skin
EMOLLIENT PROPERTIES: Contains effective emollient ingredients that help soften and protect the skin barrier
description: Product description This is a Pharmacy only product. In order to complete the sale you will receive a call or a message from a member of the Pharmaccy team to ensure that the product is suitable for you and you do not experience any side effects.If we are unable to speak to you, your order may be delayed. Please ensure your contact details are correct. 500 Lotion is a specialised moisturising treatment designed for managing dry, itchy skin conditions, This versatile 500ml lotion serves as both an effective moisturiser and soap substitute, making it an essential part of your skincare routine. The gentle formula helps soothe irritated skin while maintaining proper hydration levels. As a soap substitute, it can be used for daily cleansing without the drying effects often associated with regular soaps. The lotion's emollient properties help restore the skin's natural moisture barrier, providing relief from dryness and irritation. Suitable for regular use, this 500ml bottle offers a practical solution for those seeking to manage various dry skin conditions. For best results, apply liberally to affected areas as needed, especially after bathing or washing. The convenient pump bottle design ensures easy application and precise dosing. Safety Warning Lotion may be unsuitable for certain people. Do not use this product if you are allergic to any of the ingredients.
